description_long: This is a medium-sized, roughly rectangular stone with a layered, sedimentary appearance and a slightly uneven, jagged top surface. The stone displays a range of earthy tones, from light beige to brown, with some darker patches and subtle horizontal striations that suggest natural weathering. One side features a more pronounced discoloration, possibly from soil or organic material, while the other sides are lighter and more uniform. The edges are irregular but not sharply angular, giving the stone a naturally worn look. The surface texture appears coarse and gritty, with visible grain and minor cracks. This stone would be commonly found as a barrier or obstacle in urban parks, along pathways, or as part of landscaping features.
description: A medium-sized, layered beige-brown stone with rough, irregular surfaces and visible weathering. It features earthy tones, subtle striations, and some darker patches.
description_view_0: The stone appears rectangular with a layered, striated surface and a slightly jagged top; the color is mostly light brown with subtle horizontal lines.
description_view_1: This side is narrower, showing a vertical face with a distinct dark patch and more pronounced discoloration near the base.
description_view_2: The opposite broad face is lighter in color, with less visible weathering and a smoother, more uniform appearance.
description_view_3: This end view highlights the irregular, rough edge and a large dark patch, suggesting contact with soil or organic matter.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier along a walkway
attribute_pattern: Subtle horizontal layering and striations, with irregular mottling and some dark patches; the pattern is natural and non-uniform.
attribute_weathering: Rough with visible grain, minor cracks, and some surface discoloration indicating moderate weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil and vegetation, often partially embedded or surrounded by grass or mulch, providing a naturalistic barrier or seating element.
